title: Skyline Residences Tower
testimonial: Every apartment feels like a penthouse. Buyers consistently mention the architectural precision and premium finishes as key differentiators. Our units are 95% sold before launch.
description: Premium 32-unit residential tower with 3 penthouse suites, 12 luxury 4BHK apartments, and 17 premium 3BHK homes. Features include smart home integration, chef's kitchens with imported appliances, private pools on select units, and a full-service concierge center. Built with Italian marble, German fixtures, and custom millwork throughout.
